page.title: Template:Writers by nationality and century category header

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text: <includeonly>{{Occupation by nationality and century category header|Occupation=writers|JobPortal=Literature|<!-- -->Title demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}|Title_demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}|<!-- -->nondiff=include|<!-- -->sort_key_pn ={{{sort_key_pn| }}}|<!-- -->women_variant={{{women_variant|women}}}|<!-- -->lgbt_variant=LGBT|<!-- -->male_variant=male<!-- -->}}{{#ifexist: Category:{{Century name from decade or year|{{Title century}}00|dash}} {{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}} literature <!-- #page title to check if exists -->|[[Category:{{Resolve category redirect|{{Century name from decade or year|{{Title century}}00|dash}} {{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}} literature}}|writer]] <!-- value if does exist -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
